name: @hatchling/core
description: An autonomous AI agent that learns, mutates, and evolves

scripts.docker:run: docker run --rm -it -e HATCHLING_HOME=/data -e HATCHLING_HINDBRAIN_BACKEND=cpu -v hatchling_data:/data hatchling-core:local
scripts.docker:doctor: docker run --rm -e HATCHLING_HOME=/data -e HATCHLING_HINDBRAIN_BACKEND=cpu -v hatchling_data:/data hatchling-core:local doctor --json
scripts.docker:init: docker run --rm -it -e HATCHLING_HOME=/data -e HATCHLING_HINDBRAIN_BACKEND=cpu -v hatchling_data:/data hatchling-core:local init --non-interactive --name sandbox --purpose "Sandboxed hatchling" --personality "curious,direct"

author: Hatchling Organism
